description: MAOTTIE almond fake nails contains 24 pieces full cover nails with 12 different sizes, 1*jelly glue stickers, 1*mini nail File, 1*wooden Stick, 2*cleaning pad. Polish and file to any shape and length you like.  Short press on nails are made of quality ABS material, not easy to break. These nails are natural-looking, easy to take on and apply.  After cleaning your short almond acrylic nails with cleaning pad, choose the fit false nails size for you. Stick the adhesive double size stickers on the nails, press for a few minutes, you'll get a nail salon like nails in just a few easy steps.
